Title: The heart of the classic nike rotation
Text: This is a really good Pegasus. I’ve ran in versions 37, 38, 39, 40, and now 41, and I have to say this is the best one yet for what it is - a mileage workhorse. This is not the fastest shoe in the market, not the most cushioned shoe in the market, nor the most supportive. However, it is responsive, relatively lightweight, and stable enough to allow you to show up and log mile after mile after mile without it feeling like a chore. Especially with the new wider toe box, this really is now the shoe for those 30 to 90 minute every day runs that allow you to build your fitness from the ground up day after day. Perfect for easy runs with strides, medium long runs, and maybe a little bit of uptempo if you’re feeling good that day. Also great for doing warmups, drills, cooldowns, and light gym work.  The only downside with this shoe is that, compared to Pegasus of the past, working out in this shoe does leave a lot to be desired. But then again, it got a lot better at long runs and recovery runs, which suggests that this really is that mileage shoe with a classic feeling for every day runs when you don’t want to overdo it.  If you don’t like ground feel and you prefer a more cruise-y / rockered ride, then I would look at the Vomero instead. And if you need a faster shoe, I would look at the Zoom Fly, Vaporfly, or Alphafly depending on your budget and your needs.

Title: Nike is back!
Text: Perfect running shoe for me, great balance, looks super clean (very important so they can be retired into a walk-around shoe), premium-feel upper, and particularly as a heel strike runner the bounce really me back in my groove after a lot of runners knee struggles.

Having worn 'Pegs' for as long as I can remember I wouldn't go anywhere else. Fresh out of the box and into a 10k this morning and comfortable and supportive as ever. Keep up the good work, even if I cant keep up with the colour changes.

Title: Light, supportive; wonderful
Text: The cushioning on these shoes is superb for road running. The grip is good in dry conditions without being ‘clingy’ and with just enough give to allow a little foot rotation to make each step comfortable. The heal padding is good and middle to soft; which is what you need for hard surfaces. I’d go for something a little firmer for a cinder/wetpour track surface but these would do at a pinch. The ventilation is very good and the shoes are so light as almost not to be there. Don’t use them in wet weather as that is not what they are designed for.

Title: Nike Pegasus 41 Review
Text: The purple/magenta Nike Pegasus 41 is amazing in size and color. They have a comfortable fit around the foot and ankle. Nike did right in creating the shoe in this color. It is appealing to the eye.
Very comfortable. True to size. Highly recommend

Title: Women's Nikes
Text: I bought the Women's Nike shoes for my daughter for Christmas.  She loved them she said they're very comfortable and goes perfectly with every outfit.

Title: Pegasus amazing as always
Text: Light weight and plenty of cushion.

Title: Pegasus 41
Text: Very solid running shoe.  I hope that Nike keeps with the Pegasus.  It is relatively inexpensive.  It is a long lasting shoe.

Title: Worth the money

Title: MY PEGASUS  41
Text: I ❤️ MY PEGASUS 41 , THEY'RE SUPER COMFY, & LOOK GREAT WITH 👖
Excellent shoes for running – high quality and incredibly comfortable!

Title: Great running shoe
Text: I had the Pegasus 40 and got these when they went on sale during Black Friday. Wow. What an upgrade from the 40. These shoes are more responsive, lively, and just plain more fun than the 40. I love these shoes. The underfoot feel is firm but it has lots of energy return, and my legs did not feel tired at all. Set a new PR with these straight out of the box. If you are thinking about upgrading, buy these. If you have never ran before and are looking for an excellent all around shoe, buy these. If you have been running for awhile but haven’t tried these, buy these. People say Pegasus is behind the times, but for me it is perfect. I do not want a 45mm pillow under my foot. In a world moving towards not feeling connected to the surface you run on, Pegasus is a breath of fresh air.

Title: Nike
Text: Excellent fit and look! The shoe is true to size and shipping was fast and packaging was excellent! I have bought approximately 8 pair of shoes from the Nike store and never had a problem!
Great fit and comfort while running!

I’ve usually been pretty loyal to saucony and asics. However, these are heads and tails better than any shoe I’ve ever worn. It’s like walking on clouds and having solid support in your Achilles. Already bought a second pair

Title: running on clouds
Text: my new favorite running shoes! they’re so stylish and it feels like i’m running on a cloud ☁️ definitely going to buy another pair in a different color.
The base of the shoe on the right side makes a high point which causes discomfort. I'm going to return the sneakers.

Title: Pegasus 41 Must have in your rotation
Text: One of the most comfortable shoes, for my light jogs and even light upper body at gym,. These are so comfy,. Not wobbly as i would expect from a running shoe,. Perfect amount of cushion for the mid sole and toes. Breathable and functional.

Title: Comfortable run
Text: These provide enough cushion so I know there is cushion but not so much that I bounce when I walk or jog.  Good stability.  Nice toe box.  I owned 5 pairs of the original Pegasus 1.  While Nike has yet to replicate the greatness of the 1s in their Pegasus line, the 41s are the closest to the 1s so far.

Title: 1,000 Miles Later: The Ultimate Walking Shoe Review 👟🏞️
Text: These sneakers have been a game-changer! As a professional walker, I’ve put over 1,000 miles on them, and they’re still just as comfortable as day one. I’ve been rocking the Pegasus Trail 5 GORE-TEX, but I can’t help but wish the 41s came with GORE-TEX too.  All in all, these are incredibly durable, versatile, and perfect for anyone who’s always on the move. Trust me—your feet will thank you! 🏞️👟

Title: Good Versatile Shoe
Text: Very nice shoe, extremely comfortable and very enjoyable to run in. I use these a ton. The foam is responsive and the Air Zoom units give a bit more pop in your ride. The material in the tongue is very plush and the material is breathable. The vibrant red color adds a bit more fun when lacing up for a run. I also had the Invincible Run 3 and these feel like a good middle ground between full plush comfort and no comfort at all, this shoe offers cushioning that you can feel while letting you be able to feel the surface you are on. I do longer distance and shorter distance workouts and these are amazing fore both. Overall very good versatile running shoe. 100% recommend.

Title: Must have shoe!
Text: Excellent shoe; VERY comfortable. Have two pairs and will buy again! A+ purchase!

Title: Love Pegasus
Text: We love Pegasus. These are comfortable and look great.

Title: Love them!
Text: These are amazing. I hurt my knee and had to start walking instead of running. My Brooks had too much cushion so I decided to try these and have been so happy with them. I even ordered a second pair to wear in the house. The comfort and support are awesome. I also love that they offer wide.

Title: Awesome Shoe!
Text: Love these shoes!  The color combination is great and the spectacular comfort of the Pegasus is unmatched. I have several pairs!  They are by far my favorite running shoe!

Title: Great Looking Running shoe.

Shoes looks great; they feel both cushy and comfortable while walking.  Have had them for several months and they are wearing well.  Way to go Nike!

Title: The ultimate daily trainer
Text: The Nike Pegasus 41 is my favorite daily trainer. It is everything that you would want in a daily trainer. Logging miles over a variety of surfaces and conditions makes this shoe truly exceptional. The upper is adequately padded making for a comfortable fit. The lockdown just feels amazing giving a secure ride in tight twisting turns while negotiating tree roots running along off road bike paths. It’s a shoe that can do everything you need it to.

Title: Perfect

Title: My Shoe Choice over and over again.
Text: The Nike Pegasus line is the optimal choice for a not too much or too little cushion.  The Pegasus offers good support for orthotic foot insert for a pronator.

Title: Good buy and comfortable
Text: Very happy with my purchase, super comfortable.

Title: Best for on feet all day!
Text: I buy a new pair of Pegs every year for work. I love the improved tread, falls apart too quickly for me (2 months in maybe) And the midsole! Can definitely feel the extra bounce! It’s rainy season in Oregon so I might get the dark green Gore-Tex… they’re that comfy! Go Ducks!

I simply love them!  Certainly! Here’s a glowing review for your new Nike running shoes:  “Outstanding Comfort and Performance!”  I recently got my new pair of Nike running shoes, and they have truly exceeded my expectations. From the moment I put them on, the comfort was unparalleled—like walking on a cloud. The cushioning is just right, providing the perfect balance between support and responsiveness, which is crucial for long-distance runs.  The design is sleek and modern, and I’ve received several compliments on how they look. But beyond aesthetics, it’s the performance that stands out. The lightweight construction makes every stride feel effortless, and the traction keeps me steady even on varied terrain. Nike has really nailed it with these shoes, combining style, comfort, and performance into one fantastic package. Highly recommended for runners of all levels!

Title: Incredibly thin sole without any cushioning.
Text: These weren't for me. I can feel the cracks in the sidewalks as I run. They don't have any cushion or spring to them and I can't believe they are considered "running" sneakers. My Nike walking sneakers are way better for running than these. It almost feels like I'm wearing thin flip flops on the bottom of my feet. I'm a big Nike running shoe fan--but these just aren't a hit for me. I've gotten my slowest times ever in these. They're OK for wearing to the store--but not for running.

Title: Great shoe
Text: Great Shoes , awesome quality well worth the cash,run a little narrow for wider feet but eventually stretch true to size

Title: These make my walks enjoyable.
Text: This is a very comfortable shoe from the beginning. This is a very neutral shoe and allows to strike forefoot or heel in comfort. Wear is very even for me. My only issue is I’m only getting 190 miles of wear before the shoe isn’t providing enough support. I am over 200 lbs, which might be keeping from getting more miles. My third pair is ready to roll.

Title: Pegasus 41 are amazing!!!
Text: Pegasus 41 are amazing!!!  Love the new feel and super comfortable for easy long runs.

Title: Excellent shoe
Text: Nike has definitely upped their shoes with this new Pegasus model. Wasn’t a big fan of Nike and its comfort, but they’ve come a long way. New beginner runner here, and I’d buy these shoes over and over again. Breathable, lightweight and a good lockdown feeling when running. The toe box area isn’t narrow like most running shoes too. Excellent shoes for heel strikers. Overall, it’s hard to find something I don’t like about them. 10/10.

Title: My fave in a while!!
Text: I'm in love!! They're gorgeous shoes with the gold swoosh and accents and sooo comfy like I'm walking on clouds. Lightweight and seem to have good arch support. Very happy with this pair!!

Title: Awesome!

Title: Absolutely the most comfortable shoe
Text: Absolutely the most comfortable shoe ever, I'm buying a second pair to keep, I forget I have them on they fit so perfectly and feel like a part of me instead of something I'm wearing.

Title: Super Comfort
Text: Pegasus’s are without question, the most comfortable sneakers I’ve owned. There’s never a break-in period with these, and they’re very mature.

Title: Pegasus 41s are a reliable daily trainer with more of a ground feel while still bringing you comfort for those everyday runs
Text: After about 100 miles of use the one thing I like about the Pegasus 41s is the upper and the tongue that are very comfortable and they fit to my foot very snuggly. The ReactX Foam is comfortable but it is more of a firmer feeling than the pillow-like of the Invincible 3s.

Title: R toe snug fitting
Text: Little snug in the big toe area in my R toe. Love that I could stand on my feet all day without my feet hurting. Besides my big toe feeling snug but it is only my right toe. Nothing will be better than the Motiva! For standing all day!!! Need more colors in the Motiva!!! Please!!!

Title: Glued Seam Failure
Text: I wouldn’t buy these again. Glued seam failed after less than 2 months of use by an 11yr old.

Title: comfy but
Text: defiantly comfy but runs a little small. i’m in 9th grade and so obviously my feet are growing but not within 3 weeks. overall really comfy and will definitely get a new pair soon

Title: SO COMFY
Text: These are so comfy!!! i wear them for school and marching band and my feet barely even hurt afterwards.

Title: Son's Birthday Wish
Text: These were a birthday gift to my son. He loves then, he was having shin pain while running. His old coach suggested the Pegasus. He told me his shins no longer hurt.

Title: Beware Metatarsal Support!
Text: I fell in love with this shoe the moment I put it on but the love affair didn’t list.   Pros: This shoe is nearly perfect for someone with a mostly straight, extra wide foot. The toebox doesn’t taper too much and squish the square shaped footed of us. And it doesn’t make the heavier of us sink into too much.   Cons: it has built in metatarsal support. It doesn’t seem to hurt my foot even though I don’t need it, but I can constantly FEEL it underfoot and it drives me crazy to constantly be aware of my shoe. I tried switching insoles but it’s part of the shoe intakes and can’t be altered

Title: Great Shoe
Text: Very comfortable shoe. Nice wide toe box. Shoe is light but has great support.

Title: Great everyday trainer from a classic model!
Text: I’ve been running for most of my life and have ran in many different Pegasus models. Most recently, I went through four pairs of the 40 in my marathon training last year and this year. I really like the 41 though. I like that the Nike symbol is a little smaller and filled in solidly this time around. The overall look reminds of some of the 90s air maxes (without the airbag of course). The ride is smooth and the fit is what I expect. At this point, the Pegasus is a fastball down the middle. I generally know what I’m getting. It doesn’t offer some of the high end features of the Invincible, but this a great everyday neutral cushion trainer that you can really stack miles on. I’d argue you can get more mileage out of these than Althea Invincible, so if just depends what you prefer. After not loving the look for a bit, the 41 is great and a breath of fresh air, which makes me happy. Going from the Pegasus in training runs to the Valorfly’s on race day has been a great combination for me and I look forward to many more runs in the Pegasus 41!

Title: Design to run above 4.30 pace
Text: Very comfortable running shoes, make u running faster, cut down 1min on my 5k, feel like 4.30 pace is easy pace

Title: No breaking in required
Text: Just returned from a 3 quarter pace 5K with these straight out of the box and am starting to wish I’d set off at an easier pace and racked up more miles as they needed no breaking in whatsoever. I’ve gone back to Pegs after trying out the Infinity Run but they were far too spongy. I appreciate that the Zoom Units are part and parcel of the Peg but sticking the Peg Trail React midsole on these would make them pretty much perfect (might give the Premiums a go at some point.) No complaints and would recommend these strongly.

Title: An All-Around Marathon Trainer
Text: I have had at least 5 pairs of the Pegasus models dating back about 10 years, and have never had a pair that let me down. These are no exception. I bought them for marathon training after trying a plusher shoe (Nike Invincible 3) and realizing I needed something a bit more responsive.   I have almost 100 miles on these shoes including sprinting/walking workouts, tempo runs, recovery/base runs, and long runs of up to 11 miles (so far). I also wear them while lifting weights, although they are not ideal for heavy squatting. Based on the wear so far, I expect them to last approximately 400 miles. This is a great shoe for your all-around training and another great edition of the Pegasus family.
It's insane. I literally was in awe when I first step into these. Just walking on it felt more empowered than ever. I liked my Pegasus 39 so much and I guess this one even more!

Title: I think I'm going to need another pair!
Text: I couldn't believe how cushiony these were directly out of the box. There wasn't any breaking in  required. I think I'm going to need another pair ASAP!

Title: Size differs from previous model
Text: Sizing is very different from the Pegasus 40, width seems the same but seems shorter, when I go up half a size then the shoe is too wide and a little too much heel slip!
Super comfortable, its so amazing even for walking.

Title: best running shoes
Text: best running shoes. very comfortable and very stylish. very pleased with them.

Title: Absolutely amazing balanced outsoles, cloud without sinking in
Text: I absolutely love the comfort and the rebound of this shoe. I do not like the cloud like shoes without much rebound where you step on marshmallow and sink in and  prefer balanced mid soles. These are amazing. But literally after a month and a bit the left shoe started squeaking, making the popping sound every time I stepped on heel part - meaning constantly and loud. So I  had to return. I bought a new pair of the same ! as I love them  and I need to walk everyday but let’s see!!! Hope they will last longer.

Title: Great shoe,  One odd feature
Text: I love the shoe, and I have run in Pegasus for 20 years, but why would you put rough bumps on the exterior foam? I am not the only person who clips their calves. Those sharp bumps messed up my calves. It's not hard to remove, but it's a very odd choice.
Great shoe love running in them and look clean

Title: The Perfect Sneaker: Comfort and Support for All

Sneakers with support caused blisters after running 3 miles, while those designed for flat feet provided no support for my right foot. This pair is pure magic—it offers excellent support without causing blisters. They're soft, super comfortable, and just wow! and they look amazing

Title: LOVE THESE!

Rise isn't overly huge....I'm not a runner so I'm a daily user and look for comfort and breathability. These fit the bill perfectly. I'll be getting a personalized color as a second pair so I can add just a bit of flare to a black pair.

Title: Great redesign but Nike By You fails the sizing
Text: I love this redesign BUT the Nike By You sizing is way off. I’ve worn 10.5 for 35 years without issue and these shoes are at least 1 to 0.5 oversized. Such a waste and sadly signs of the decline.

Title: Best walking shoe!
Text: I bought these for walking and they are so comfortable. Feels like walking on clouds.

Title: Awesome feel and look great
Text: great shoes.  They really look great and feel comfortable.

Title: Don’t feel any energy return
Text: Definitely a big difference from the 40s. They are much softer and lighter. Only thing that’s annoying is the foam I’m not feeling any bounce and the react x feels hard.

Title: Best Running Shoes
Text: Best Shoes I've ever had.  So comfortable and light.

Title: The Best Pegs So Fat!!!
Text: I’ve been a huge fan of the Peg line for quite some time now.  They’re some of the best road running shoes on the market.  I started with the 38s, then 39 - 40, and I must admit that after recently trying out the 41s, they are the best so far.  With my bunion, I usually prefer the wide size but could only get them by paying extra for the Nike By You option.  However, since the  41s run smaller than its Peg predecessors, the x-wide size (it only comes in regular and x-wide  sizes) fits just like a wide which is perfect for me.  No orthotics are necessary to make them fit more snuggly.  Yes indeed, the 41 model checks all the boxes!  I plan on getting another pair soon in a different color.  I highly recommend these shoes for the novice and avid runners.  You won’t be disappointed whatsoever.

Title: Fit and Size
Text: Best fitting running shoe to date:

Title: Sizing runs small for the 41's
Text: I have to give them a one star rating because of size. I have 9 pair between the 39's and 40's. Size 13 always fit perfectly. Never had to think about it. Great comfort and durability. 100% happy. Got my 41's yesterday and was very disappointed that the 13's are too small. My toes are touching the front. Unwearable for my regular size and I'm not going to go back and forth trying other sizes. I even checked the label in the shoe to make sure they sent the correct size. They did.

Title: Upgrades
Text: Definitely an improvement from the 40s, a much nicer foam with the full ReactX cushioning. The tongue feels more plus and strides are a lot softer on landing now.

Title: Overall great
Text: Most comfortable shoe I've ever worn, very nice to run in as well

Title: Pegasus 41 width is not the same as Pegasus 41, IMO
Text: I have two pairs of the Peg 40's 11.5 wide and they fit great and feel great. Better than 11.5 wide Bondi 8's or Glycerin 20's I ordered the Peg 41 11.5 wide and as soon as I put them on I thought maybe I had ordered the wrong size. Nope,the Peg 41's are 11.5 wide. Don't know why but the toe box seems alot narrower in the Peg 41's. Wore them for about 10 min on the indoor track and they are just too small in the toe box. Went to local Dick's Sporting Goods and tried on the Peg 41's in size 12 and they feel much better. So... do I just exchange for size 12 or try size 12 wide??? Never worn a size 12 in my life. Ordered online at Nike.com. If you normally wear a Nike wide in the Pegasus 40 be careful when ordering the Pegasus 41 because they are not the same fit.
Loved the style!! And true to size.

Title: Quality
Text: Amazing show, super comfy and supportive. Gives that spring in the stride when running. Sometimes the laces come undone so have to double knot when running but no major issue.

Title: THE BEST RUNNING SHOES

Son loves this shoe! Says they are super comfortable and has “bounce”.

Title: Wide feet
Text: The Pegasus line is not recommended if you have wide feet. I have the Pegasus 40 and the shoes are quite narrow for the Regular model. I measured myself in the Pegasus 41 and it is the same. It is better to request the extra wide one, although I doubt that there a big difference.

Title: My favourite to date , love Pegasus 41
Text: Absolutely love the new Pegasus 41, my favourite to date .  They are more supportive and comfortable than my 39’s. Great arch support.  They are light weight and breathable and basically just such a pleasure to run in.  I’m 48 and run 3 times a week and run a marathon 2 years ago . These will definitely be enough to see me through a half marathon.  Purchased size 6 and I am a 5 , as always go up shoe size in running trainers.  Highly recommended.

Title: SO comfortable

These 41's are much more springy and comfortable, and stay glued to my feet with looser lacing that the 40's did, to the point where I leave them tied and simply slip them on and off. The heel doesn't eat my sock which is nice also.

Title: You Need These!
Text: These look even better in person. They’re lightweight and very comfortable.

Great pair of daily trainer. Plus, after you put the miles on them you can wear them as an everyday shoe. Win-win.

Shows are great, just as pictures

Title: Pegasus trainers are so dependable
Text: Very comfortable and nicely padded for road running. Very pleased .

Title: Very comfortable
Text: I was a little skeptical at first because I’m used to running shoes with a lot of cushion but I’m glad I purchased these. Tried them on and ran 2.5 miles with no pain, they are very comfortable. I purchased my regular size and the bright neon color is perfect. Highly recommend!

Title: Lovely!
Text: I have run 15 miles in these already…didn’t have to break them in at all. They almost feel like Nike Free. Will buy a second pair.

Title: Clouds on my Feet
Text: I keep gravitating to buying Pegasus running shoes! The new design and comfort is just great and comfy on my feet!

Title: For the professional on their feet all day! + running 😇
Text: As a physical therapist, I am on my feet all day and I could not find a better shoe to accomplish my day-to-day tasks and my workout at the end of the day in FULL COMFORT.  Definitely provides a plush, but responsive feel with support feedback via lace system and free cushioned tongue. The zoom reactx foam and zoom units at forefoot are a big upgrade on the 41, and overall my favorite silhouette yet! Great gift idea w/ Father’s Day this weekend, my Pops and uncle definitely getting a pair from me!

Title: Good fit, lively ride
Text: Been on 2x 10k runs with these now. Previous pair were Pegasus 38s. First impressions are that this is a more stable shoe that feels lighter on the foot and more responsive. Seamless upper is similar in fit with more airflow and an improved heel tab that makes them easier to put on. This is not a super-cushioned trainer, more of a balance between speed and comfort. Generally I don't like the instability of a super-soft sole. The Pegasus 41 suits me just fine so far.

Title: Pegasus 41 SOTY
Text: These shoes are very comfortable for an everyday use. Not to mention they are wonderful for running. The strong ankle support has no slippage, the toe box has a very airy mesh and the sole I very comfortable and has the perfect rebound and squishiness. The revamp from last years version makes this the perfect shoe for looks and feel. Highly recommend.

Title: The BEST shoe!

Title: True Love
Text: I adore this iteration of the Pegasus! I was a Pegasus wearer for years, but abandoned them around 2018 to try “better” shoes. I returned to the Peg this year because I just could not find a daily trainer I loved, and I am so glad I gave the Pegasus another chance.   I was so excited about them out of the box on my easy 7 mile run that I chose them for my 20 miler over the weekend, and they delivered. Excellent cushioning while still feeling light and flexible underfoot. I ran on a mix of pavement, gravel, and dirt trail, and they had good traction and stability without having that over-built feeling so many shoes have now.   The upper is super comfy. I do have a narrow foot, so for me, the fit was perfect, but it is a narrower shoe with a sock-like fit. It runs true to size in terms of length.   If you like a super built up shoe with a ginormous amount of forefoot cushion, this may not be your jam. But if you love a shoe that allows your foot to move naturally without too much bulk underfoot, i would highly recommend. I have five other brands in my rotation right now, and this is easily my favorite trainer of the past couple years.

Title: Uncomfortable and Disappointing
Text: I recently purchased a pair of Nike shoes with high expectations, given the brand's reputation for quality athletic footwear. Unfortunately, my experience with these particular shoes has been extremely disappointing.  Firstly, the material used in the construction of these shoes feels cheap and uncomfortable. It lacks the flexibility and breathability that I usually associate with Nike products. The synthetic upper feels stiff and unforgiving, leading to discomfort during prolonged wear.  Moreover, the cushioning and support provided by the shoes are subpar. I expected a more comfortable and responsive feel, especially considering the premium price tag associated with the Nike brand. The insole seems inadequate, providing minimal shock absorption and leaving my feet fatigued after even short periods of use.  Durability is another significant concern. Despite the prominent Nike logo and branding, the overall build quality of these shoes does not live up to the standards I've come to expect. After just a few weeks of use, signs of wear and tear started to appear, making me question the longevity of the product.  Additionally, the design, while visually appealing, seems to prioritize aesthetics over functionality. The narrow fit and lack of proper arch support make these shoes unsuitable for those with wider feet or individuals seeking enhanced comfort for extended activities.  In conclusion, these Nike shoes have been a regrettable purchase. The uncomfortable material, lack of adequate support, and questionable durability make them a poor choice for anyone seeking a reliable and comfortable pair of athletic shoes. I would strongly advise potential buyers to consider alternative options within the same price range that offer better quality and performance.

Title: The best shoes in the world... EVER!
Text: Got my first pair in 2015 & they're still going strong. I own 6 pairs now. I have a black pair I use for work - 12 hours healthcare shifts: bought those in 2017 and they too are still going after all the constant wear and use. These are so durable, extremely light so don’t fatigue your legs and, the best bit, they’re the most BREATHABLE shoes I’ve ever had! The durable mesh lets so much air in/out so your feet don’t overheat. This is brilliant on 12 hours shifts and fantastic if you’re doing lots of walking around. Have they got too dirty? No problem - just chuck them in the washing machine! And they’ll dry quickly afterwards too! These don’t have super squishy underfoot cushioning but as a result they offer excellent foot support - again perfect for tons of walking. I love shoes and these are the best footwear ever imho. The simple design also pairs well with almost ANY clothing. I hope they never stop making them and dread the day they go out of style.

Visually, these shoes stay true to the classic Dunk design, offering that iconic silhouette we all love. The Elemental Pink colorway adds a fresh, feminine twist that’s perfect for any outfit.  One thing to note is that the sizing runs a bit larger compared to my Nike Panda Dunks. I highly recommend going half a size down for the best fit.  Overall, these are an amazing addition to any sneaker lover’s collection. Highly recommend!

I was a bit apprehensive when I read the fit was a bit snug but swift delivery meant I didn’t have to worry as the fit is fine. I’ve only worn them for a few hours and they seem really comfortable. I’m a size UK 5.5 with a high instep but always buy UK 6 and I have enough room in these trainers without them being too big. And I don’t normally go for black trainers but of all the colours available in my size, this colour way was the one I preferred. The black with white Nike Swoosh and sole make a nice contrast.
So comfortable great price and lots of compliments

Title: Super comfortable
Text: I absolutely love these shoes. From the moment I put them on, I noticed how incredibly comfortable they are. The cushioning feels soft yet supportive, making them perfect for both walking and running. They provide great shock absorption, which really helps reduce foot fatigue, even after long periods. I can wear them for a run, a long walk, or even keep them on all day without feeling discomfort or pressure in my feet. The fit feels secure but not tight, and they offer excellent support for everyday movement. In addition to comfort, the design is sleek and modern, so they look great with athletic wear or casual outfits

Title: Like clouds

Title: 18 Needs De-evolution
Text: One pair of the Vomero 18 was plenty. I scoured the internet for 17 and 16s because the 18 is a downgrade of an amazing shoe I’ve been wearing since it first launched. The thick midsole is artificially springy (think kids’ moon shoes) and I’ve never experienced calf fatigue like I do in the 18. Instead of offering a Vomero max they should offer a Vomero min that takes it back to the 16 cushion. Good news is it is still quality construction.

Overall I give the shoe 5 stars for a Great fit, cushioned, great rocker geometry that isn’t too pronounced. Well made shoe that doesn’t break the bank. I do think I prefer this shoe over the plus.

I was worried because these shoes are on the heavier side, but honestly what it ads in weight it more than makes up for in comfort and construction. These make my run feel easier and really soften the impact on asphalt and pavement. They also seem to help with posture when walking in them. Great shoe !!! Had to go up 1/2 a size and didn't require any breaking in for me.

Title: Comfy
Text: When I bought these shoes online, I thought they were bright orange, so when they arrived I was disappointed that they were more of a salmon color. I also thought they were really bulky looking. I put them back in the box to return them without even trying them on due to my disappointment with the way they looked. A little bit later, I don’t know why, I decided to try them on. I couldn’t believe how comfortable they were. Most comfortable shoes ever!  Decided to keep them. Haven’t run with them yet but just walking around, they are great, even if they aren’t as pretty as I thought they were going to be. I just wish all women’s Nike shoes came Women sizes only—not unisex—and that women’s sizes came in better colors. We like dark and bright colors too— not just pastels.

Text: This is undoubtedly the best running shoes. I laid off from running for 2 weeks due to getting sick. Title: Poor sole design
Text: The Vomero 18 should have a 5 star but the sole construction like the Vomero 17 is poorly designed and is not durable for running. I have been running in Vomeros since they came out for almost 20 years and typically they would last through 300 miles of running and then would be retired for many miles of walking thereafter. And they were a go to trainer. With the 17 and 18 the extremely thin and poorly glued soles were becoming detached after less than 30 miles of running.

Title: Lighten up on the upper
Text: First some positives. The Vomero looks fantastic. When this shoe has reached the end of its running life, it will fit in great as a street wear shoe, which I can't say for many of my running shoes. It's well cushioned, but you already knew that. It's also very stable. And the waffle tread on the outsole provides fantastic grip. The downsides are all related. The Vomero is extremely plush, heavy, and warm. First the plush - the upper is downright pillowy. When you lace up, the tongue just spills out, swallowing the laces like a pillow. It's really impossible to overstate how thick and plush the tongue and the rest of the upper is on this shoe. All that pillowy softness adds weight, which is noticeable, especially on long runs. And, as you might expect, breathability is terrible. There's essentially no airflow and your feet will feel really warm unless it's cold outside. I also own a pair of Nike Invincible 3's. The run is just as cushioned (and a bit unstable) with a massive slab of ZoomX foam underfoot. But the upper on the Invincibles is engineered for breathability and weight savings. I don't mind a heavy shoe where the weight is due to the foam underfoot. For me, though, the weight isn't worth it if that weight comes from a plush upper - especially with the problems of breathability. Switching to an engineered, lightweight upper would be a massive improvement. As-is, the Vomero is hard to recommend.

I highly recommend !

Title: Love these!!
Text: My new favorite! I have three pairs now since they dropped early this year!  Love the narrower toe box - no rubbing - heel is cushioned- great feel and support - so comfortable!! Lightweight! LOVE!!

Title: Too Narrow for Wide feet.
Text: Too narrow for wide feet. I’m size 10 and the ankle support kept irritating my ankles in addition to tightness on the upper side of my foot. I recommend going a Half size up.

Title: Love the color and the fit
Text: Nice, not to heavy workout sneaker. I know it’s a running shoe but I wear it to the gym

Title: Top forefoot is very low
Text: Unfortunately the top of the forefoot was too low and applied too much pressure to my feet. Felt like my forefoot kept on getting pinched every step I took. The fit was better with no insole, but I didn't like the foot bed texture with no insole.

Title: A good comeback
Text: I have run in Vomero for years and stopped a few models back when the shoe changed significantly.  This model is great, good cushioning but not overly spongy.  The shoe has some roll to the foot strike, but not overly done.  The two things I wish were improved was that the toe box was a little wider and that the shoe was a little more breathable.
I bought for my wife and she love it . 👌👌

Title: Nike has a winner with this one.
Text: This shoe is perfect, the cole way fit and comfort is perfect. I will surely be buying another pair in the near future just to wear for an everyday shoe.

Title: So comfortable and cute!
Text: Comfortable right out of the box! Very little break in period. Such bright and fun colors. They feel like running on clouds. Even when the rest of my body is in rest mode, my feet are comfortable!
They are thr best, most comfortable sneakers ever. Worth every penny, I need another pair, in another color! I love them

Title: Quality
Text: Masterful.  I'm not a runner, but I'm on my feet 12 hours a day, and these have the support and comfort.  Love the tongue as well. Went a half size up as I typically straddle 11 and 11.5 depending on the model.  No notes, keep it up Nike.

Title: Almost Perfect 👏
Text: NIKE VOMERO 18 BLACK   Great running trainer… been using these for my easy and long runs recently. Super comfy with plenty of cushion. The ZOOM X foam layer is snappy enough to run at pace.   Only downside of this trainer is my feet get quite hot… possibly down to the fact they’re all black and I’m the English weather has been beautiful this spring ☀️   8/10 will be staying in my running trainer rotation for the foreseeable.   I got a 7.5UK which is my usual size for running trainers. Roomy toe-box perfect 👌

Title: Nike Vomero’s are the real deal 👌🏽
Text: I recently bought the Nike Vomero 18, 1st pair of Nike running shoes.  THEY DO NOT DISAPPOINT!! I love them!!! They are perfect!! Can’t wait to run the Nike After Dark LA!!! 🫶🏽

Title: Cushioning is excellent
Text: Stunning to look at and super comfy for running and hyrox type workouts  Love them
I love the shoe, but the color is deceiving. In the picture it looks pink but is actually white. I worked in them yesterday and they felt great.
Stylish, but too heavy for my liking.

Title: Best runners ever!
Text: Probably the best runners I’ve ever had. Always wore the Pegasus but find these extremely comfortable. True to size.

Title: Absolutely fantastic
Text: Fantastic shoe for running and walking. The cushioning makes this so comfortable and it has a fun bounce. I tried on several shoes and as soon as I put this one on it was a clear winner.

Title: Just buy them!
Text: I’ve been a runner on and off since 2012 and this is my first pair of Nikes after numerous pairs of Brooks & Hokas. When I tell you I’ve been missing out…JUST WOW. My knees are grateful and the level of cushioning is unsurpassed. Good job, Nike! You have a forever customer now!

Title: Most comfortable shoe
Text: These are the most comfortable shoes I’ve ever worn! I was a huge adidas EQT fan so much that I had bought 10 pairs and still have brand new ones left. HOWEVER, after trying the Vomero 18’s on, I think I’m going to sell whatever adidas I have left and buy a few more pairs of the vomero. By the way I’m a 6’1” 240lb dude and they still keep their shape.

Title: Most COMFORTABLE running and walking shoes ever!!!
Text: I was so sad when they discontinued the Nike Infinity react run. But this new Nike Vomero Combines the Nike Infinity react and Nike invincible together, which are my two favorite daily trainers. My first run was a half marathon solo and these issues performed above and beyond. I ran slow and walked the miles and the shoes were really comfortable. These are my new favorite daily trainers now, thank you Nike!!!

Title: Top quality
Text: What a running shoes. Reactive and the cushioning is amazing. My top favorites rn.

Title: Plato’s Forms: The Running Shoe
Text: Bought these on a whim as I started running and wanted something that looked good and was reported to function properly. These fit that bill. I love the look and enjoy wearing them running around my neighborhood, but also they are so comfy. It took a few miles before these were properly broken in but yes these are awesome shoes.

Title: Great
Text: Awesome and very comfortable.  Die hard nike fan here. All products are well worth it.

I absolutely love this sneakers. It’s my second pair. I also have it in green. I am a hairstylist and it helps me with my posture. I have sciatic nerve pain. It helps cushion support my back. I made a really good decision to buy this sneakers. I also do Zumba and it works very well for dancing. I’m looking forward to get a third pair. Thank you, thank you, Nike.❤️
Comfy, easy to jog in! Possibly the comfiest shoes I’ve ever worn

Title: Yes yes yes
Text: It’s like I found these in a pot of gold under a rainbow. These are just so much fun to run in and I will definitely buy another pair when my current pair gets used up. Big thumbs up
I absolutely love these for running, not only are they stunning but they’re also super comfortable and cushioned

Title: Like a cloud
Text: I walk anywhere from 15-25k steps a day as an online shopper. Normally I wear air max’s or AirForce1’s easy On’s. True to size if you wear other Nike products on your size. I have normal foot width and after 8-10 hours my feet and body feel significantly better and switching to these sneakers from what I would wear on an average workload day. Buying a 3rd pair for a different color way as I do enjoy wearing these for work on the regular now.

Title: Awesome trainers, not just for running!
Text: I didn't know that these were the new, "best on the planet" running trainers before buying them. I wanted a pair of comfortable, supportive trainers for work, because I walk and stand for almost a full 8hr shift. I have to say that they are perfect 👌🏼  The only issue I have now, is that I would prefer a pair of all black for work, and they don't have them in my size anymore.

Title: The best running sneakers
Text: I have found my forever running shoes. I did a 5K run today for the Live Like Jake Foundation and these sneakers just made my run so easy! They are lightweight yet very soft and cushioned. The best running shoes that I've worn!!

Feels great and very responsive but are short and narrow. I wear size 13 and they do not fit true to size. Hopefully they bring out a 13.5 or a 13 wide because the shoe is great but the sizing is not.
I love everything about these sneakers. I love the look of the sneakers, not to mention the comfort and lightweight feel when I walk. I would highly recommend.
It’s super comfortable , I’m using it for indoor training and walking.

Title: Stunning!
Text: I like to find comfortable running shoes, choosing comfort and performance over how the shoe looks. These are incredibly comfortable, almost cuddling the foot with great bounce. They are also the most beautiful shoes I’ve ever seen, the colour is incredible, they look like cake!  I hope Nike make shorts to match!

Title: A great shoe for your steady and recovery training runs.
Text: This is a great improvement on the previous Vomeros and they were very good. A great high mileage training shoe. Responsive and light with super support.

Title: Effortless Miles, Unmatched Comfort
Text: The Nike Vomero 18 has completely levelled up my long-distance game. True to size with a plush ride that feels like I’m floating over the road. The cushioning hits that sweet spot between soft and responsive, giving me the stability I need at tempo pace and the comfort I crave on recovery runs. Breathability is solid, lockdown is secure, and the outsole grips like a dream on wet roads. Whether it’s 10K at 4AM or pushing 20K on tired legs, these shoes show up every time. Easily the best upgrade this season. Highly recommend for anyone chasing comfort, distance, and performance in one slick package.

Title: love the cushion
Text: I have been buying Nike shoes for at least 10 years and these are the most comfortable shoe I have worn.  The cushion makes it easier to go long distances.   the design of the rest of the shoe is also made for comfort, like the padding around the heel and the tongue.  the padding also allows the shoe to fit snugly without slippage.

Title: Luis Rivera
Text: These sneakers are unbelievable. So comfortable. I walk about 15,000 steps a day and run moderate pace for 30 mins. These shoes work perfectly for me. My feet often hurt while walking/running. No more! Amazing!

Title: Va Va Vomero!
Text: One of the most comfortable shoes ever! The upper is plush and instantly comfortable. The sole is plush and bouncy with a rocker feel. I have the Pegasus premium and these are even more comfortable! Great shoe! I hope it lasts a while.

Title: Best running shoe
Text: Quite possibly the best daily running shoe I've ever had. Its fast but provides good support, response and stability. Its got a small fit so I'd recommend half a size up from what you normally wear.
Most comfortable Nikes I’ve had. I wear them to work everyday. I can stand long periods of time and walk all day in them without my feet hurting or feeling fatigued.

Title: Nike Vomero 18 — the best Nike has ever made
Text: ZoomX cushioning with solid stability it’s like flying but with total control underfoot.The upper is breathable,snug and disappears on long runs no rubbing,no distractions.That rare,perfect balance of lightness and support. Whether you’re training,racing or just on the move  these shoes don’t just run,they flow.

Title: My new favorite shoes!
Text: These shoes provide maximum cushioning while also providing stability making them the most comfortable shoe for running and the gym.  I was able to do Bulgarian split squats wearing them because of the stability.  Running and walking in these shoes is like walking on pillows!  They also do not cut into my ankle requiring heel pads like most over sneakers and shoes.  I have over 100 Nike shoes and these are my new favorites!  The colors are so fun too.  I bought four pairs so far and have received many compliments on them.

Title: Amazing
Text: These are amazing and very comfortable. In fact the most comfortable trainers I’ve ever worn. I will buy another pair but it’s sold out in black.
Those Nike shoes are very comfortable it really helps me to stand on my feet for long no p

Title: Definitely worth trying out!
Text: I have been using Hoka's for years and they were perfect but never were aesthetically pleasing so I tried OnCloud. OnClouds cushion didn't last as long as Hoka's does but they looked better. I came across an article about how good Nike's newly released running shoe performed so I thought I'd try them out since they were a lil cheaper than the Hoka ones I was used to buying. I have used them for a month now every weekday and they are everything I wanted in a running shoe. It works and I think they look good also. I will definitely buy another pair in about a month or two.
Possibly my favorite pair of Nike shoes of all time. The most comfortable by far.

Title: Most comfortable shoes hands down!!
Text: By far the best, most comfortable Nike shoes ever made! I’m hooked these are my go to sneakers for running, walking and standing on my feet all day. Don’t hesitate, buy it now you won’t regret it. Nike keep up the good work!!  More color way please and thank you!

Title: All day comfort for Nurses, Hairstylist, etc….
Text: Even if you’re not a runner but still on your feet all day…. These are the best shoes by FAR!!! On clouds are amazing as well but these Zoom Vomero 18 blow them out of the water!

Title: Game Changer Comfort!!
Text: GAME CHANGER! By far the MOST comfortable shoe I have ever worn. In addition to that, high quality and just a cool looking shoe!

Title: Perfect daily trainer
Text: I never feel compelled to leave reviews here, but these shoes have literally brought the joy back to running for me. My previous favorite Nike shoe for slower / shakeout runs was the Invincible 2 and these bring the same responsive cushioning with a substantially enhanced rocker geometry. I have about 45 miles on them so far and no signs of the cushioning deteriorating at all. Fit is perfect and the hell cushioning is outstanding. These aren’t race day shoes for sure, but are a great daily trainer and can be pushed for at least some speed intervals. Couldn’t recommend these more. FWIW I’m a heavier runner at 5’10” 200 lbs.
These have been the perfect daily runners. They are so comfortable and are super supportive. Great to pair with the vaporflys.

Title: I never write reviews but WOW. Get this shoe!
Text: Perfect shoe for my 3 week trip to Europe where I was consistently walking 15-20K steps a day! Comfortable & made walking a breeze! My new favorite shoe!

Title: Great cushioning and support!
Text: Feels like walking on a cloud! The cushion and support is amazing. I walk on them all day for work and my feet are never sore. Highly recommend for arch support too as well as if you have a wider foot!

Title: Comfort & Support
Text: Very comfortable & supportive shoe. The cushioning makes it feel like you’re walking on a cloud. It’s still just as comfortable & supportive while running, which is wonderful.

Title: Very very cool
Text: Very, very cool. They are incredible. Very soft. They are comfortable and lightweight. They feel like walking on clouds. They fit true to size, we bought them for my husband, he is very pleased, we ordered 11.5

Title: AMAZING !!!
Text: I was recommended this sneaker when it was first released for running and I am going to purchase another pair! I use them for walking and running and can say they are by far the most comfortable sneaker I’ve ever purchased. It feels like you’re walking on air and they make running a breeze. I always had an issue with sneakers and running causing pain in my knees and ankles but these shoes have just the right amount of cushioning to support my legs. Highly recommend!

Title: Amazing
Text: I have the Pegasus 38, 39, and 41 (one really dirty, one for the gym, and one for outdoor runs), plus the Motiva (for work and free time). So yeah… I didn’t really need another pair of shoes. 😅 But after reading the reviews, I figured I might as well try them on in the store. I also tested some of the top-rated shoes from other brands.  And color me surprised—the Vomero 18 is incredibly soft, yet still has a bit of bounce. The toe box is super spacious, and despite how soft it feels, the shoe still offers decent stability. I’ll have to see how well it holds up over time, but as long as it doesn’t go stiff or fall apart, I think I’ve found a new favorite work/free time shoe.  As mentioned, I tried a few competitors as well. Some came pretty soft as well, but they were often more expensive and often lacked that nice bounce that I found in Vomero 18.

Title: Cushioning beyond belief
Text: Wow, I am completely blown away by how cushioned this shoe is. I’ve been purchasing many Nike shoes for the past 30 years and every type of shoe that I purchase offers a different level of comfort. This shoe pretty much surpasses everything I’ve purchased in the past. Hats off to the Nike Team and how driven they are to make every shoe more advanced than the next!!

Title: Very nice
Text: I love these shoes! They fit comfortably and are good to walk or run in. I’m between a size 6 -6.5 and went with the 6.5 for more room in my toes and glad I did. I highly recommend.

Title: The Perfect Pair
Text: The Nike Vomero 18 marks a significant evolution in Nike’s lineup, delivering unparalleled cushioning and comfort for runners seeking a plush ride. This latest iteration introduces several key enhancements that set it apart from its predecessors and competitors. Absolutely love this shoe.

Title: 18's Bring Vomero's back to where they should be
Text: These are very cushiony gym shoes.  Great for working out and cross training, probably running as well...although I have worn these since the 5's as gym shoes.  Last year's model was pretty poor, this one is one of the best.  Better than than the 16's even, as I still have a pair of those that I wear as house shoes.  Don't hesitate to grab these if you are on the fence.  Superior to the 17's in every way, and a little better than the 16's.

Title: New Romero 18!
Text: Dope shoe! Adds an inch to my vert to my padding & is so comfy with the large foam bottom!

Title: Love ThemN
Text: Most comfortable pair of running shoes I have ever worn. I might have to buy another pair.

Title: Loving the new Vomero 18.
Text: I was an avid Nike wearer for 20+ years but then decided to try Brooks and Hoka, after a few pairs of Hokas my feet started to hurt on the outside balls of my feet and so I searched for a cozy pair of Nike’s again. After about a week of wearing the Vomero 18 my foot pain is starting to go away. I’m loving my new Nike’s. Now Nike just come out with more colors for the Vomero 18 and maybe a Gore-Tex version.

Title: The "Goldilocks" shoe for foot problems
Text: Was having foot problems...Don't get me wrong - I won't give up my Hoka and Brooks..... But Brooks Glycerin was too hard - Hoka Bondi 9 was too soft, so I needed an "INBETWEEN" shoe to walk and run in .... THIS IS IT!. I haven't looked at Nike shoes slideways' for years.....BUT the manager of the Nike store running dept stopped me and asked me if I'd try on a pair of the Vomero 18 - which I didn't think much of at that moment - but after doing a few quick runs...OMG this is the "Goldilocks" shoe I needed! Went out for my first run this year and was pain free and it held up quite well - no drama - nothing...was a solid cushion on the feet!! Dont take my word, try a pair out yourself and see!

Title: I need this in wide.
Text: I have numerous vomero 17 wides. They fit me. But this update, though I went up half a size, squeezes my pinkies. Please make the wide versions.

Title: Amazing!!!
Text: I suffer from plantar fasciitis on my right heel, and let me tell you I had no hope until I put these bad boys on my feet. Comfort is amazing !!!
Amazing pair! Good bounce and return energy and feels very stable.

Title: Great shoe. Make more in size 16
Text: One of if not the most comfortable pair of shoes I have ever had. I hope they can make more in a size 16. Feel lucky I was able to get a pair. Nike make more shoes in larger sizes.

Title: Very comfortable!
Text: I got these shoes a week ago and look forward to wearing them because of how comfortable they are. I am 5’11 235lbs and wear a size 11. They are true to size and for comparison I wear a size 11 Air Force 1, Jordan 1, vans new era, and 10.5 wide converse chucks.   These shoes feel super supportive and very comfortable. I’ve done some sprints and light jogging and they just make me want to run more.   The sole is quite high which made driving feel a little weird but for the walking/casual jogging use case I think these are my favorite shoes. Otherwise very happy with the quality of the material and look of the shoe. I got the summit white and coconut milk color way which I think helps take attention away from how tall these soles actually are.
Amazing cushion and comfort for both walk and run.

Title: Great cushioned easy run shoes.
Text: Very nice and plush running shoes, not particularly bouncy, but a nice cushioned feel and fairly stable. Upper is a little warm. Good ground traction.

Title: So far so good
Text: Haven't gotten to run in them because of the weather but on the treadmill they are excellent. I love them.

Title: not near as good as the 17
Text: have very little support for the arches of your feet and just not as good as the 17, 17 also felt much more reactive compared to the new design

Title: Best Vomero so far
Text: Excellent running shoes well done Nike. Weight is not a issue, and I felt lighter running it than the 17, probably due to more energy rebound. Very good stability. No heel slip (the 17 had a little heel slip to me in the beginning). The only thing remains to be seen is the durability. Also very nice looking shoes.

Title: VOMERO EXPLODE!
Text: As a marathon runner who wears Nike elite racing shoes that are notoriously restrictive, this new Vomero is a welcome surprise. The fit is very generous and ample and the cushion is beyond comfortable. If you think it’s too big just tie it tighter. Suggestion Nike: Create a low price racing Vomero with a curved carbon fiber or nylon insert and watch the revenue explode. In fact call it the VOMERO EXPLODE! This shoe is simple enough to help anyone train without strain and be ready for the big race, but it may also keep competitors up at night!

Title: Worth the Money!
Text: I’ve only been wearing these a few days, but so far they are the most amazing shoes. I have peripheral neuropathy and my feet hurt a lot. These are like walking on clouds. Puts a little bounce in my step, literally, but my feet have very little pain when I wear these and do not fatigue much at all. I highly recommend these shoes! And will be purchasing more!

Title: Max Cushioning for real
Text: They really do mean max cushioning wow. This is my first pair of Nike running shoes and yeah wow they make a big difference. i’m a heavier set runner and i often experience knee pain - i didn’t get that at all with these shoes. My first run with them was entirely knee pain free. i felt supported and cushioned on every stride . i don’t run for performance or speed, at the moment i just do it as a fun way to keep fit. If you’re looking for max speed look elsewhere, if you want comfort and support during your long runs, these are defo the shoe for you. I also don’t feel like they’re too heavy which is the main issue i see with other reviewers. they’re also not too hot. Honestly to me they do exactly what they advertise and they do it well. Vomero 18s gained a new fan. i also love the red orange and pink sunset design. just a fantastic all-round shoe!

Title: Great cushioning and style
Text: Very soft and nice feeling to the cushioning. I also have the Brooks Glycerin Max which is super cushioned, but I’d say those are slightly firmer. The Vomero 18’s feel “slightly” less stable, I assume due to the softness, but not bad. Kinda similar to the NB 1080v14.  For some reason the outside of my left foot was a little achy while running but they may just need to break in more. Overall, I would definitely recommend. Hopefully they come out with more colors. I waited until the all black came out since I don’t like white sneakers that much.

Title: Nothing better exists
Text: If I could give 10 stars I would. This is the most comfortable shoe I’ve ever put on my foot. I’ve owned many other brands and none have compared to these. The cushion + support is amazing. Body is tired of running before my feet are. Looking forward to walking around Disney World in these.
Very comfortable, I love my Shoe

Title: Amazing Comfort and Performance – Nike Vomero Delivers!
Text: I recently got a pair of Nike Vomero running shoes, and they have exceeded my expectations! From the moment I put them on, I could feel the plush cushioning and support. The ZoomX foam provides an incredibly soft yet responsive ride, making long runs feel effortless.  The fit is perfect—snug but not too tight—offering great stability without restricting movement. The breathable upper keeps my feet cool, and the traction is excellent, even on wet pavement. Whether for daily training or long-distance running, the Vomero is a game-changer.  If you’re looking for a shoe that combines comfort, durability, and top-tier performance, I highly recommend the Nike Vomero!
Have a little over 20 miles on these so far so good. Very comfortable and well made.

Title: Too hot and heavy.
Text: The foam does it's job, but there's nothing special or memorable about it. They're pretty boring to run in, and far too hot, heavy, and clumpy, for anything other than short recovery runs.   They are the epitome of "mid" and I'm struggling to see how they're going to fit into my rotation.

Title: Lots of cushion.
Text: Lots of cushion. Adds spring to step. Fits like a glove.

Title: Too bright
Text: I've been wearing Pegasus 41, thought I would try something with more cushion. Vomero does have more cushion but quality wasn't as good. And the color I chose was too white and bright for me.

Title: STUNNED - Luv em!
Text: Just STUNNED when I put these on. Didn’t expect it to feel this perfect. So well cushioned on the heel, springy in the forefoot. So plush on the tongue and heel with no heel slip. Looks 🔥. Similar cushiony feel to invinc 3 but more spring on forefoot and heel area more snug. Run, walk, errands these feel GREAT!

Title: Cloud like
Text: Possibly to cushiest shoes to date, they feel like running on bouncy clouds and make me feel like my joints are being protected from the high impact so much more than other shoes. True to size, would run in again 10/10

Title: Perfect fit and feel
Text: Great cushioning. Not too soft. Just right. I usually buy Nike running shoes one size larger than my regular shoe size and they fit perfectly.

Title: Excellent Shoe!
Text: I bought these shoes for my wife. So far she loves them. She loves the great health support and cushiony feel. Nice wide toe box that she really appreciates.

Title: Best of best!
Text: Feeling like running on cloud. “Im a beginner runner btw”

Title: Nike - you've impressed this marathoner -just what I needed for this training season!
Text: Exactly what I was looking & hoping for! THANKS NIKE! The last Nikes I purchased and wore were the Vaporfly Next %3 and loved them for racing but these I bought for marathon training, my mileage on the  pavement. I am SO impressed with these shoes I just purchased another pair after getting 20 miles in these already! The RIGHT amount of cushion! Other brands I've tried for my training has been either too much cushion or not enough. I had plantar fasciitis several years ago, so I am cautious about what shoes to train in but these are amazing. I'm up to 40+ miles a week to date, and will get up to 60+ so fingers crossed these will be with me through them all.

Title: Recovery Shoe!
Text: Brilliant recovery shoe.  Very soft, very comfortable for a short run.  I normally wear Pegasus but these are a good edition for a 20 min jog following a heavy day training or working.  I have worn mine quite a few times now for short road runs.

Title: Amazing cushion
Text: Amazing cushion for both running and walking as per my current experience. It would have been better if we get wide option along with standard width.
Very nice running shoes and fit just right

Title: Recommend
Text: Very comfy to do my runs in and they are light weight which helps to do my longer runs

Title: WOW
Text: True to size. A real cushioned shoe. The first 5 miles in these came and went so quickly it feels like it never happened

Title: Awesome Shoe
Text: Oh my goodness, these feel great! They have lots of great cushioning and are reminiscent of the Invincible but more streamlined and supportive IMO. Nike, please offer this shoe in more colors, like black and white or a neutral gray. I wear a 9.5 and ordered a men’s 8 and will probably order another pair soon.

Title: Decent workhorse daily trainer
Text: Good quality build. Very plush so definitely a bit weighty. Not as soft as I expected so don’t expect a ride like the Invincible line. Overall, a decent workhorse daily trainer.

Title: Great Shoe!
Text: Great shoe. Not mushy at all. Great heal support. You don't get the feeling your heel is rolling over the side of the shoe. Nice wide toe box. Highly recommend!

Title: Quality is abysmal
Text: I got these for my son to wear for track practice. He's had 6 days of practice, running about a mile each time, and they're already ripping. Horrible.

Title: Excellent running shoes
Text: In love with these feel great look great spot on first time wearing them I best my pb by 5 seconds

Title: We Back
Text: I know I'm a Nike Stan, but the King of Comfort is back. Great job with these Nike.

Title: Great shoes for post recovery surgery or general walks/runs
Text: These shoes offer amazing cushion and stability for your walks or runs. I am recovering from a total hip replacement and so far the Vomero’s have helped me go far in my walks or runs with amazing support. I have little to no soreness or pain after my exercises

Title: Nike Vomero 18 review
Text: Excellent, the most comfortable shoe I've ever worn.  The price is worth the experience.

Title: Too much foam
Text: You are turning your best shoe into cushioning monster. The winter blue color wave Nr 17 was already forcing me to lean  in the awkward forward position… The Ss24 is still my one go to, but they will soon wear off with no real alternative

Title: More colors please! A+ shoe.
Text: Hands down the most comfortable shoe I've ever worn. I'm a teacher and I can walk in these all day no problems. I tore my achilles in 2022 and have had a hard time finding a good running shoe that doesn't stress my achilles and this shoe just blew my mind. Ran a personal best mile straight out of the box. Must I say more?

Title: A+
Text: this is a great shoe! I try every new model that comes out based off of me running outside and this is a very very comfortable shoe. Definitely worth a try definitely not too expensive either. But feels amazing A+.

Title: The shoes are amazing
Text: I love the shoes ! I work 10 hours on concrete and they are so comfortable and I feel like I can just glide when I’m running very impressed definitely will buy another pair

Title: A little bulky but extremely comfortable
Text: Wore these straight out of the box for my long run.  On first impression I thought they looked bulky and maybe a bit heavier than the Invincible 3 that I normally run this distance in, but when I put them on they seemed very comfortable and roomy. They didn’t budge, no blisters, no sore heel, nothing.  Really comfortable run with plenty of bounce.  Only thing is, I seem to hit my shin a few times so they are definitely a little wider on the sole than the Invincible 3. I stopped wearing Hoka for this reason although these are definitely not as wide as the Hoka.  The colour is fab and bright and I’m looking forward to lacing up again for my next run in them.  Can’t wait to see what else comes from the range.

Title: Finally, Nike got it 100% rights+. Bye bye Hoka!!!
Text: Like the best of Invincible 3 and Infinity Rn4 plus a more stylish fit. Did 7 miles at 8:30 minute pace right out of the box and felt like Nike finally got it 100% right!!! Just PERFECT. Not as bouncy as the Peg Premium but a way more comfy every day run shoe than those clunky Hokas! A+ to Nike Vomero 18!!!

Title: BEYOND AMAZING
Text: There are literally no words, but I’ll try! I’m not a runner, so I just got these to walk around in. I’ve never in my entire life, had a shoes on my feet, that were even close to being as comfortable as the Vomero 18!!! If I could give 10 Stars I would. This shoe is literally a life changing experience for me!

Title: Great. No notes.
Text: Great shoes for running. A little heavier than I’d hoped, but incredibly comfortable and stable. These look great, are incredibly soft inside, and are a joy to run distance in. Five gold stars.

Title: Nike Vomero 18 - The Best Just Keeps Getting Better!
Text: The best just keep getting better! Absolutely love the fit, the feel, the bounce, the ride, the style of the Vomero 18.  Nike just wins again!

Title: Disappointed
Text: Way too heavy and too much stack height. Hot spot/blister during first run. Everyone is obsessed with “Max cushion” these days, but there is no reason for this shoe to be this clunky and heavy.

Title: He only wears Nike trainers and football boots fit just like a glove . Very happy with all your products .
Text: My grandson age 12 loves the trainer says they’re so comfortable a definite hit . True to size arrived next day .

Title: The best
Text: These shoes are so comfortable to wear. I used them to walk my dog and run and both great! They really support my feet and I really love the heel and how it perfectly wraps around for a snug fit. Super impressed with this new version!  The style is on point, 100% recommend!

Title: Very good
Text: Feels super unique combined with the unique looks these are a must pick up

Title: Really unique max stack experience!
Text: Excellent shoe— It’s really unique in the Max Stack space with a higher 10mm drop, which with the forefoot rocker, feels awesome. It’s great to have in a rotation if your Achilles is needing a break.   It also doesnt feel as heavy on the run as it feels in hand. Excited to get more miles in!

Title: Well Done Nike
Text: Loving these. As comfortable as the NB 1080v14 but more supportive. Been using them for cardio in the gym and they really are unbeatable.

Title: Vomero is back!
Text: Done couple of runs with my new V18. Very comfortable from the very first run. Lots cushion and gives you the best support. Love it!

I have previously tried the Pegasus 41 and Invincible 3 but they had there flaws. The vomero 18 is a perfect combination between the two and give you that smooth cushioned ride from the invincible and the springy responsiveness from the Pegasus. Overall a great pick for everyday use and running any distance.

Title: So perfectly squishy
Text: These feel and look phenomenal on my feet. Plenty of squish, but also plenty of bounce back.

Title: Wait, these are Vomero’s!?
Text: Very squishy plush ride in these 18’s. A wonderful roomy toe box, and a mix of padding and mesh upper makes your foot feel luxurious! Great support and stability. Fit true to size as well. Overall, a great road shoe to train and put miles on.

Title: Immediately sold with the feel of this one.
Text: This brings back the absolute comfort of the first invincible, in the form of the new Vomero.  As soon as I put these on, and walked around, I was sold.   The shoe has good stability with a good look. I'm looking forward to seeing more colorways.

I wish I could give these 10 stars. They are worth every penny. I bought the Pegasus Premium and I really thought they were the most comfortable running/walking sneakers ever, but the Vomero 18's are just a notch above. Excellent job, Nike. Make more colors!

Title: Effortlessly Smooth
Text: Soft and smooth. On paper it’s heavy, but the distribution is so good you don’t notice. Still not light by any means. The upper is a little puffy yet very luxurious upon step in and the embroidered lacing eyelets are a nice touch and lock down the foot well. The geometry of the shoe works so well with the zoomx and reactx midsole foams and feels like an effortless ride. And for the price of $150, you can’t beat it! Easily one of the best max cushion shoes on the market for the price right now.

Title: Icon Cushion
Text: One word. Cushioned. Amazing daily running shoe

Title: The new standard of comfy trainers
Text: My new go-to training shoe. Incredibly comfortable and supportive. I have the Invincible and the new Vomero is more comfy and stable, imo the Invincible lacked in stability. I also have Peg 41's and to me these feel better in every way. I ran a 5k in these right out of the box and I'm sold.

Title: So Much Cushion!
Text: Took my first run in these this morning and they felt so good! The cushion is amazing. They changed the tongue of the shoe that makes it softer against your foot but it’s a little thick at the laces. It is hard to lace the shoe tight. They are definitely quieter than the 17s when you run. I love the curve of the shoe. It makes you want to keep on running! Overall great everyday running shoe!

Title: Super comfortable
Text: Super comfortable, wore them to the gym today. True to size, no pinching on the sides of the foot. The footbed seems Improved from the 17s and is a lot more comfortable for my foot shape. The extra padding in the heals offers shock absorption that I appreciate as my knees aren’t the greatest. I did notice the inside of the shoe says road and they did seem to have more grip on the wet pavement this morning than some other shoes

Title: Incredible feel and comfort
Text: One word: Amazing!! Coming from the Vomero 17 and many pairs of the Invincible 3, I love these all the same. The zoomX foam is plush and responsive, and provides great energy return. Fit is true to size, and the upper is plenty comfortable

Title: Best Max Stack Trainer
Text: Best Nike daily trainer in a while. Took these on a long run straight out of the box with no issues. Lots of cushion and bounce. Having tried other brands max stack options, I have to say, the Vomero 18 is much better. Comes in cheaper then the other brands max stack offerings as well, which is a total plus.  Runs TTS and roomier than most Nikes. Can't wait to see the rest of the Vomero lineup.

Title: Love for walking/standing only
Text: These are so comfy for walking! Road running? Not so great with the narrow toe box. I feel like my foot cannot expand the way it should/does while running, therefore I found my feet to feel very stiff & cramped. But I did enjoy these for walking. I spend most of my days standing due to my work field, and at the end of the day my feet were feeling great in these.

Title: Lovely trainers
Text: I absolutely loved these trainers! They’re really comfortable and look great. Not ideal for rainy days, but brilliant for comfort and style.

I absolutely love these Nike Pegasus Premium Men's  Road Running Shoes. I was looking running shows similar to the 2014 Nike air max running shoes I had but none of the shoes even reassembled. These are the closest thing to it and I loved them. I have both the red and electric green ones. Theyre very comfortable. I can feel the cushions when I wear them. I wore them to my doctor appointment and starting with my eye doctor I got a lot of compliments. Also shipping was quick. I got them delivered two days after I ordered them. I'm very pleased with these Pegasus Premium Road running shoes.

The shoe is attractive, but not worth the price if it falls apart after several wears.

Here’s some what some negatives, I have balance issues due to sciatica eruptions in my left leg now though the sneaker is real narrow I can feel the difference in my balance in them cause it’s a squishy sneaker but it works for me as I walk and sprint (I’m too big to be running 😂) , but with both sneakers on at the same time it’s good, manageable. I mention that cause with one shoe on to try it out I can feel the difference in how squishy it is and it took more control for me to balance myself, abs this negative is really me being picky so with the university good PegasusPremiums the laces didn’t have any 3M laces like all of the other color ways so I bought some of my own and I love them A LOT! Also! I’m an Air Max fanatic, do Air Zoom go in the category as an Air Max? Someone comment let me know your thoughts if possible, but overall this is ONE of my best Sneakers EVER! I will say there's less stability if the shoe is carrying a lot of weight. When I was carrying my 10 year old on my shoulders there was a lot of squish to the shoe. But excellent cushion and no stability issues without the added weight. Also dried out well after water rides just airing out in the sun.

Title: Decent. Squeak / weight
Text: So close to being excellent. Part of my review is practical and part is personal preference -  Practical: squeaks. The shoe squeaks. It’s one of my greatest pet peeves and worries and frustrations with “air” - it doesn’t always happen, but when it does, it’s horrible.  I don’t like noisy or squeaky shoes of any kind - and air can be particularly bad.  In these, only the right shoe squeaks. And it’s every step. A two-beat squeak. It’s awful.  To me, it speaks to the fact that it doesn’t have to be that way (one shoe doesn’t do it) and therefore somewhere the quality was lower in the right shoe.  Usually, with air, it takes a puncture or etc for stuff like that to happen / over time. This immediate squeak just made me sad.   Personal preference: I don’t like a bulky shoe. I prefer slim and athletic - I think these are less bulky than I imagined (and I’m definitely not saying “heavy”) but they’re…thick. And naturally, the midsole and outsole combined are weightier than the upper. It’s difficult for this not to happen in making a shoe, but I don’t want to feel as if I’m lifting / dragging some weight off the ground as the upper holds on tight to it. I want the shoe to feel like one “whole.” I come at this from a soccer players perspective. The footwear should be connected as one. Disconnected is not a good feeling.  Now, runners who run run run a lot may find it to work out well over long distances / many miles. I don’t imagine that being the case, but it may be.   Air has the benefit of not ever really losing the bounce - as foam can compress eventually and then it’s done - but air adds weight and variables such as squeaks - and height which can lead to some roll/slightly less stability (not calling the shoe unstable) -  And I personally don’t love that feeling.   I digress - tho I’m ready to work in Nike design and testing whenever they’re ready to have me :!

Text: I received these in mid-July (2025), and at first, they were the most comfortable shoes I’ve ever worn. I used them daily for walks and even as my go-to airport shoes. Unfortunately, after only a month, the support completely gave out. The cushioning is still there, but it now feels like the air shifts around under my feet, making them unstable and uncomfortable to wear. I’ve worn plenty of Air Max, VaporMax, and even Scorpions without issues, but this pair gave out surprisingly fast.  2 stars, cause they were great at first, just didn’t last.

Title: These shoes ARE GREAT
Text: These shoes ARE great. In response to any criticism that these “cause your heel to wobble”—shoes do not cause that, rather a lack of stabilizing strength in a person is the cause. Those who struggle with stability should seek out shoes that will help them with their issue instead of blaming a shoe. Those who want comfort and cushion but do not need extra stabilizing support, the combination of air unit, react x, and zoom x are genuinely hard to beat. This is a GREAT shoe for regular mid distance runners, daily walkers, or those just looking to enjoy the pleasure of how great this shoe feels.
